question: Will the WTI Crude Oil Spot Price be above $98.50 on May 28, 2026?
reason: Recent forecasts and geopolitical developments suggest WTI Crude Oil Spot Price will be below $98.50 on May 28, 2026.
evidence: EIA's May 13, 2026, report projects WTI crude oil price at $85.68 per barrel in 2026.
OilPriceAPI's May 1, 2026, forecast estimates WTI crude oil price at $56.00 per barrel in June 2026.
Recent geopolitical developments, including signs of a U.S.-Iran peace deal, have led to a significant drop in oil prices.
As of May 24, 2026, Brent crude oil price fell to around $98.76 per barrel, marking a 4.62% decline.
The closure of the Strait of Hormuz, a critical maritime trade route, continues to disrupt energy markets and inflate prices.
Analysts warn that even with a potential agreement, full recovery could take months, involving de-mining operations and resumption of shipping.
These factors collectively suggest a low probability of WTI Crude Oil Spot Price exceeding $98.50 on May 28, 2026.
